title: Jaanu
desc: Ram and Jaanu are childhood sweethearts who meet at their school reunion after nearly two decades. Although initially awkward, they soon start recollecting their past and resolve their differences.

title: Jalsa
desc: Sanjay, a troubled youth, joins an extremist group after a tough childhood. A police officer tries to guide him, and his daughter falls in love with Sanjay.

title: Kalpana
desc: Raghava, who is afraid of the dark and fears ghosts, is possessed by three spirits. They want him to avenge their murder.
A young police officer joins the control room. He answers a call from a girl in danger. He promises to help her and discovers similar crimes. He tries to catch the criminals.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A lighthearted comedy packed with laughter, mischief, and fun moments that celebrate friendship, joy, and carefree living.

title: Vyjayanthi
desc: Vyjayanthi, a brave army officer, is tasked with wiping out terrorist activities in Visunoor. Here, she crosses paths with Vadivakkarasi, a tyrannical ruler who has links to her troubled past.

title: Oohalu Gusagusalaade
desc: Venky wants to be a news reader. He faces challenges posed by his boss, Uday. Things get worse when Uday seeks his help to woo a girl.

title: Slot - Accu Dhurandar
desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Dhada
desc: Vishwa's life takes a turn when he chances upon Rhea. Meanwhile, he also crosses paths with two underworld men who sell girls internationally.

title: Bluff Master
desc: Uttam, a smart con man, targets gullible people to extort money from them. However, the tables turn when he gets involved with a dangerous gang that uses him to do their bidding.

title: Nyayam Kosam
desc: CBI officer Rajasekhar investigates the death of Jyoti, after proving that it was a murder and not a suicide.

title: Happy
desc: A politician refrains his daughter from finishing her college as it would affect his politics and decides to get her married to a police officer.

title: 90ML
desc: Four bored girls befriend a practical, progressive newcomer, gaining new energy and perspectives that spark courage, friendship, and adventures beyond their ordinary lives.

title: Hanumanthu
desc: Hanumanthu, a simpleton, goes on a revenge spree when he discovers that Krishnamurthy had murdered his father, Hanumanthiah.

title: Party
desc: Bujji and Nani, college buddies, get trapped by a local don for some minor misdemeanor and need a huge amount of money to get out of trouble.

title: Rajani From Rajamundry
desc: Rajani, a carefree software engineer, falls in love with Sandhya. When she's kidnapped, he faces a gang of criminals to rescue her and save his love.

desc: A young man appears in Shirdi and spends his time meditating. He displays miracles, unites Muslims and Hindus and he is named as Shirdi Sai.
